rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Prayer to the Trinity, “Eternal Trinity, Praised and Honored,” ዘለዓለም፡ ሥላሴ፡ ስቡሕ፡ ወውዱስ፡
Introduction.
Article 1, On the Holy Spirit.
Article 2, On the Sign.
Article 3, On the Sign.
Article 4, About My Chosen.
Article 5, On the Sign.
Article 6, On the Antichrist.
Article 7, On the things I told you.
Article 8, On the conversation between the Lord, Mariam, Martha, and Salome.
Article 9, On the gift given to the ones who persevere.
Article 10, On the Holy Canon of the Church.
Article 11, On the Ordination of the Bishop.
Article 12, Prayer for the Ordination of the Bishop.
Article 13, How the Bishop Must Attend to the Altar.
Article 14, On the Teaching of the Bishop in the Church .
Article 15, On the Catacumens.
Article 16, On the Order of Communion, containing the Anaphora of Our Lord.
Article 17, Prayer when Believers Receive Communion.
Article 18, Prayer when the Bishop takes the Cup .
Article 19, Prayer After Holy Communion.
Article 20, Prayer for the Sick.
Article 21, On the Praise of the Congregation (which is called, The Prayer of the Covenant).
Article 22, On the Secret Teaching (which is called Mystogogia).
Article 23, On the Ordination of the Priest.
Article 24, Prayer on the Ordination of the Priest.
Article 25, On the Priest who Prepares the Altar.
Article 26, On the Rule of the Priest.
Article 27, On the Hearers.
Article 28, On Those who are Saved and on Those Who Perish.
Article 29, On the Visitation of the Sick.
Article 30, On the Ordination of Deacons.
Article 31, On the Responsibilities of the Deacon.
Article 32, On the Number of Priests and Deacons at the Service.
Article 33, On the Order of the Church (i.e., locations for each person).
Article 34, On Late-Comers to the Service.
Article 35, On the Ordination of Deacons.
Article 36, On the Widow.
Article 37, Prayer Over the Widow.
Article 38, Prayer of the Widow.
Article 39, On the Female Sub-Deacons.
Article 31 (sic), Prayer of Ordination for the Sub-Deacon.
Article 41, On the Ordination of the Reader.
Article 42, On the Virgins.
Article 43, On the Believers (lit., Apostles).
Article 44, On the Examination of New Believers.
Article 45, On Receiving New Believers for Baptism.
Article 46, On the Holy Greeting.
Article 47, On the Head Covering for Women.
Article 48፡ On the Laying On of Hands on the Catacumen.
Article 49, For the Catacumen, on Receiving Suffering.
Article 50, On the Exorcism of the Catacumen, containing the prayer, God of the Luminaries.
Article 51, On the Order of Baptism.
Article 52, On Chrismation (the second of the seven mysteries).
Article 53, The Order for the Blessing of the Bread.
Article 54, On the Season of Pentacost.
Article 55, On Eating and Drinking with Believers.
Article 56, On the Blessing of the First Fruits.
Article 57, On the Order of Standing in the Church.
Article 58, On the Hours of Prayer.
Article 59, On Receiving Communion.
About the End Times.
About the Deceiver.
The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles.
Canon for the Sanctification of a Desecrated Church.
